case_title: YELENA SKLOVSKY VS. OLYMPIC VIEW REALTY,LLC et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SKLOVSKY, YELENA AS TO DEFENDANT OLYMPIC VIEW REALTY,LLC THE VILLAS PARK MERCED DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUL-22-2005 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-18-2005 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUL-07-2005

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SKLOVSKY, YELENA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OLYMPIC VIEW REALTY,LLC DBA THE VILLAS PARKMERCED $15,396.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $15,396.00, STATUTORY COSTS OF SUIT ARE: AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF(S), SKLOVSKY.
